svg.aria-label: Illustrative Blood Centers of America member-benchmarking dashboard: KPI tiles, production versus cohort median, and a monthly output trend.
svg.text: Production plan attainment vs cohort median
Trending up. 8 of 8 months at or above plan since the benchmark program launched.
Illustrative data for demonstration. Each member sees only their own figures, benchmarked against the de-identified cohort.
